Our MenuNuestro Menú

Everything cooked fresh to order — fish, burgers, breakfast & moreTodo cocinado al momento — pescado, hamburguesas, desayuno y más

⭐ Our Signature Dish

Classic Battered Cod & Chips

Fresh Atlantic cod in our legendary light, crispy beer batter — the one reviewers from Leeds, London and Scotland can't stop talking about. Served with hand-cut chips, mushy peas and tartare sauce. This is what we're known for, and we don't take it lightly.

From €12.95

Medium includes mushy peas & tartare sauce
